---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Rincoin Core
title: ''
labels: Feature
assignees: ''

---

<!--
NOTE: Changes that affect consensus, block subsidy, transaction
validation, network protocol, or P2P behavior should NOT be submitted
as a GitHub feature request. Instead, please open a Rincoin Improvement
Proposal (RIP) following the process defined in RIP-0001:

  RIP repository: https://rips.rincoin.org
                  (redirects to https://github.com/Aevust/rincoin-rips)

This GitHub feature request template is appropriate for:
  - GUI improvements
  - RPC convenience additions (non-consensus)
  - Build / packaging / CI improvements
  - Documentation requests
  - Wallet UX (within existing consensus rules)
-->

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
     Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

**Describe the solution you'd like**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or
     features you've considered. -->

**Scope check**
<!-- Does this feature touch any of the following? (yes/no for each)
     - Consensus rules / block validation
     - Subsidy / halving schedule
     - P2P protocol / network magic / handshake
     - Mempool acceptance policy
     - Wallet on-disk format
     If yes to any, please open a RIP at https://rips.rincoin.org instead. -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature
     request here. -->
